name: World's Best Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
This recipe is said to have come from a famous cookie maker. So make,
bake, and compare to see if these cookies aren't "the real thing." One
feature that distinguishes these cookies from traditional chocolate chip
cookies is their perfect size. It comes from using a small ice cream scoop
to drop them onto the cookie sheet.
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugars; add butter and mix together until
well combined. Add vanilla extract and eggs; beat until smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, sift dry ingredients and gradually add to the
creamed mixture. Mix well until a stiff dough forms. Fold in chocolate chips
and nuts (if using).
4. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper or wax paper. Using a small ice
cream scoop, drop dough onto the sheets.
5. Bake for 10-12 minutes at 350°F. Remove from oven and cool on wire racks.
6. For ice cream sandwiches, place one cookie face down, add a scoop of
ice cream, and top with another cookie.
